real_insight: The chaos drill nobody asked for has a different structural property than the feature work whose value is conditional on a launch landing on time. The first accumulates formation that does not depend on completion; the second's value evaporates if completion slips. The verse is the doctrinal claim that THIS structural property is real and is specifically a property of practice without fruit-attachment, not of effort generically.
objection: Could be misread as 'just keep grinding, even small work counts' — that would be platitude. The engineering layer explicitly guards against this: the falsifiability rejects 'undisciplined effort under the rubric every little thing helps' and the counter-example explicitly carves out structurally-fruit-bearing actions (interrupted schema migration producing data corruption) as outside the verse's scope. The contrast structure (chaos drills practiced without project-attachment vs feature work tied to a launch) is the operational test for which kind of work the verse's safety claim applies to.
